cause_analysis.narrative: Bloom Beauty churned on 2026-03-21 after 88 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 109 times, but the client only replied 9. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
